response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The reference JSON lyrics for IRyS's song did not match the performed audio at all, as she sang 'Bazing Flare' instead of the rap song in the reference. The second song's lyrics in the reference were placeholders. 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON was ignored for lyrics due to mismatched and missing text; 100% manual transcription and translation of the performed songs were performed. 3. Timing & Pacing: On-screen silent text cards introducing the characters were captioned during the transition. Subtitles were tightly split and timed to follow the rapid duet vocals and chaotic overlaps of the performers.
